message:
test(unit): expand workflows.rs inline tests (368→509) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 141 new tests covering: parse_number/capture_number edge cases,
extract_token_usage full/partial lines, CodexTokenUsage::has_any,
CodexExitOptions defaults, CodexSessionParseError display/trait,
StepResult builder methods (cont/done/retry/abort/wait_for/send_text),
TextMatch builders and description, ExecutionStatus serde roundtrip,
WorkflowEngine default/custom max_concurrent, LockAcquisitionResult
methods, PaneLockInfo serde, step_error_code_from_result all variants,
redact_text_for_log truncation, redacted_step_result_for_logging,
FallbackReason display/serde all 6 variants, FallbackNextStepPlan serde
roundtrip, now_ms plausibility, generate_workflow_id format,
ctrl_c_injection_ok Allowed/Denied/Error, WaitCondition StableTail serde,
TextMatch::to_wait_matcher valid/invalid regex, build_verification_refs,
parse_codex_session_summary, DescriptorLimits defaults, DescriptorFailure
Handler interpolation, DescriptorMatcher/Trigger, DeviceCode parsing,
PaneGroupStrategy serde, WaitConditionResult/Options, AuthRecoveryStrategy
label/from_detection, build_needs_human_auth_plan, validate_session_id,
format_resume_command, WaitCondition::pane_id for all variants. Ratio: 52→40.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
